creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text: devel/pyside2 and friends have been updated to 5.15.2 in ports r557300 - looks like that fixed this issue: https://www.freshports.org/devel/pyside2 lists 5.15.2 as available at least on 64bit platforms. (not sure about 32bit - but then kde@ has taken over these ports)
